creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Created attachment 188175
collectd.5.8.0.update.patch

There is a new version of net-mgmt/collectd5. I've made a patch which updates collectd to this new version.

Also I've added support for java (merged proposed patch from bug #223760). I've tested new version with poudriere. You can check logs at http://pkg.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/11x64-testing/2017-11-21_15h04m10s/logs/collectd5-5.8.0.log
